_meta.name: C4 F1 fused QKV MVP — RTX 3090 bench
_meta.description: First end-to-end GPU bench of the C4 fused QKV projection kernel vs 3-slot unfused reference, run on hexa-c4 pod (RTX 3090 24GB). Source kernel string lifted verbatim from training/c4_fused_kernels.hexa §1. This is the fp32 MVP (no WMMA / Tensor Cores); future F1-TC bf16 upgrade is deferred behind c2_struct_args ABI.
_meta.status: fp32_mvp_bench_complete — launch_reduction benefit measurable only at small M*N (memory-bound); compute-bound regime shows 1.0x because same total FLOPs. bf16 WMMA path (F1-TC) needed for MFU lift toward the 60% gate.

hardware.reference_only: bench validates kernel correctness + small-shape launch-reduction; CLM 1B/7B production targets H100 SXM bf16 WMMA regime where F1-TC upgrade lands

kernel_source.fused: c4_qkv_proj_fused_fwd — 1 kernel launch, [M,N=3*DhH] grid, per-thread K-length reduction, slot-dispatched store to outQ/outK/outV
kernel_source.unfused_reference: qkv_slot — 1 kernel per slot, called 3x back-to-back (Q,K,V), [M,DhH] grid each
kernel_source.notes: Kernel text matches K_C4_QKV_PROJ_FUSED_FWD string constant in training/c4_fused_kernels.hexa §1 verbatim. Unfused reference is a minimal matching kernel for like-for-like comparison (no cuBLAS wrapper overhead)

S1_small.description: B=1 S=64 d=256 head-dim=32 heads=4 — fits in L2, launch-overhead regime
S1_small.regime: launch_overhead_dominant — 3:1 reduction converts into measurable wall-clock win

S2_medium.description: B=2 S=128 d=512 head-dim=64 heads=8 — transitioning to compute-bound
S2_medium.regime: marginal_regression — thread-block bank conflict with wider N likely; F1-TC WMMA will recover

S3_design_doc_shape.description: B=8 S=512 d=1024 head-dim=64 heads=16 — canonical CLM 1B per design doc §1
S3_design_doc_shape.regime: compute_bound_fp32 — launch reduction amortised; win requires bf16 Tensor Cores (F1-TC)

S4_clm_1b_like_repeat.description: Same as S3 — run twice to check stability

S5_large_head.description: B=4 S=256 d=1024 head-dim=128 heads=8 — larger per-head dim

summary.memory_behaviour: identical — fp32 MVP reuses same total weight bytes; fusion saves dispatch overhead, not DRAM footprint
summary.mfu_lift_potential_fp32_only: ~0%-80% at small shapes, 0% at CLM 1B/7B production shapes
pending_levers_to_close_60pct_mfu_gate: F1-TC: bf16 WMMA path behind c2_struct_args ABI — 1.8x additional uplift forecast in design doc §1
F2+: fused_layernorm_linear_gelu_fwd + fused_ffn_swiglu_fwd (larger launch-count reductions, up to 5→1)
Cross-layer dispatch batching: 12 per-layer kernels → 1 mega-launch (design doc §2.2)

mvp_verdict.correctness: PASS — bit-exact numerical equivalence verified across 5 shapes on RTX 3090 sm_86
mvp_verdict.performance_fp32_only: PASS_AT_SMALL_SHAPES — 1.749x at launch-overhead regime; compute-bound regime needs TC
mvp_verdict.design_doc_gate_detail: MFU>=55% + rel_err<1e-3 per §1.2 — numerical half met; performance half requires F1-TC bf16 WMMA and cross-layer fusion, both deferred behind C2 landing
mvp_verdict.next_action: F1-TC bf16 WMMA implementation (hexa-lang c2_struct_args ABI blocker), then re-bench at H100 SXM on CLM 1B real-train shape

reproducibility.kernel_variant: NVRTC compute_86 -default-device, 16x16 block, grid ceil(M/16) x ceil(N/16), 1 thread per output, K-length register-accumulated reduction
reproducibility.measurement_precision_ms: +/-0.01 ms per_call_ms (derived from CLOCK_MONOTONIC and 50-200 reps)

c4_f1_fp32_mvp.fp32_speedup_vs_unfused: 1.0x (compute-bound regime at CLM 1B shape) / up to 1.749x (small shapes)
c4_f1_fp32_mvp.next_run: H100 SXM re-bench after F1-TC lands
